# jamfschool_ibeacon (Resource)

Manages a Jamf School iBeacon.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "jamfschool_ibeacon" "example" {
  name        = "Classroom A"
  description = "iBeacon for Classroom A"
  uuid        = "E2C56DB5-DFFB-48D2-B060-D0F5A71096E0"
  major       = 1
  minor       = 100
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the iBeacon.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `major` (Number) Major value (0-65535).
- `minor` (Number) Minor value (0-65535).
- `uuid` (String) iBeacon proximity UUID. A random UUID is generated if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier of the iBeacon.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Copyright Jamf Software LLC 2026
# SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0

# iBeacons can be imported by their numeric ID
terraform import jamfschool_ibeacon.example 42
```
